claim.observation: fsstat on rocba-cdrive.e01 reports: File System Type: NTFS; Volume Name: Windows; Version: Windows XP; Volume Serial Number: F0E0FE66E0FE3288; Cluster Size: 4096; MFT entry range 0 - 479488.
claim.interpretation: The evidence is a single NTFS volume from a Windows XP system (no partition table; mmls returned nothing), so user data lives under 'Documents and Settings'. This establishes the forensic baseline for the ROCBA disk triage.
